Summit Example Bank sent this targeted invitation for the Summit Select Card.
Invitation code required: FICTIONAL-SELECT-2026.
Invited personal applicants can earn 75,000 Summit points after $6,000 in purchases in the first 6 months.
The annual fee is $149 and is not waived.
The card network is Visa.
Targeted offer expires July 15, 2026 and is not transferable.
